title: Rampball
description:
The unpredictable tilting and rotating behavior of the Rampball challenges the user’s balance skills and triggers creative movement. Rampball® balance balls are suitable for playing, exploration and balance training.

The Rampball® has an extra strong spring system that makes it tilt to the sides. The 50R/70R-models are also equipped with a ball bearing that allows them to rotate around vertical axis.

Tilting balance ballDiameter 35 cmHeight 36 cmWeight 27 kgTilts 5 cm in all directionsFall height 36

Tilting balance ballDiameter 50 cmHeight 51 cmWeight 66 kgTilts 10 cm in all directionsFall height 51

Tilting and rotating balance ballDiameter 50 cmHeight 51 cmWeight 75 kgTilts 10 cm in all directionsFall height 51

Tilting and rotating balance ballDiameter 70 cmHeight 70 cmWeight 201 kgTilts 15 cm in all directionsFall height 70

Artificial grass/wet pour ground covers (rubber/cork etc.)

Grass/loose-fill covers (wood chips, sand etc.)
short_description:
The challenging balance ball
The Rampball® has an extra strong spring system that makes it tilt to the sides. The 50R/70R-models are also equipped with a ball bearing that allows them to rotate around vertical axis.

The outer layer is made of durable EPDM and the core of non-toxic recycled rubber.
Multiple Rampballs are suitable for use in groups and courses in motor skills parks
Delivered in 22 colours. Please have a look at the colour chart below.

title: Rampit
description:
The Rampit ™ activity rack can be used in a myriad of ways to trigger children’s desire for varied physical movements. Rampit™ is excellent for fitness purposes and allows for uses that put all the stabilising muscles to work.

Rampit™ is a high quality activity rack with a smooth surface and with dimensions adapted to provide good grip for children’s hands. Rampit™ is excellent for developing classic gymnastic skills as well as for creative movement. It can also be used for fitness activities for children, youth and adults.

Rampit™ 85

Not suitable for loose fills.

title: Rampit TWIN
description:
The double horizontal bar (pull-up bar/gimbarr) belongs in all schooyards. It improves agility and requires the use of a multitude of the body’s muscles and make children return to the classroom with flushed cheeks after breaks.

Rampit Twin™ is a hight quality bar with rounded ends and a powder-coated finish. A wide range of exercises and activities is possible, like climbing, somersaults, pull-ups, gymnastics and swinging. The dimensions are adapted for children and youths.

title: Playground Loop
description:
The in-ground trampoline has a strong appeal. It adds weightlessness and pace to the play, and when you put multiple trampolines in a series or combine them with other equipment, they are even more captivating.

Playground Loop™ from Eurotramp belongs to the most robust trampolines on the market, luckily, considering how users like to jump non-stop. The 1-metre diameter model has excellent bounce, and is hand-picked by Rampline to work optimally with our motor skill park concept. Our in-house developed PlayPro™ trampoline rim provides a neat and durable transition to the ground cover, which is otherwise particularly susceptible to wear around the edge.

Rubberized vandal-proof webbing.
Diameter (jump area): 98 cm
Steel frame: 150x150x30 cm
Weight: 160 kg

Wet pour ground covers (rubber, cork)

Grass (in combination with wet pour ground cover)

Loose fills (in combination with wet pour ground cover)

Certified by TÜV according to Playground equipment EN 1176-1:2017

The illustration shows a cross-section of a mounted trampoline.
short_description:
tough enough to be popular

Playground Loop™ from Eurotramp belongs to the most robust trampolines on the market, luckily, considering how users like to jump non-stop. The 1-metre diameter model has excellent bounce, and is hand-picked by Rampline to work optimally with our motor skill park concept. Our in-house developed PlayPro™ trampoline rim provides a neat and durable transition to the ground cover, which is otherwise particularly susceptible to wear around the edge.

Can be supplied with integrated LED light
Rubber coated webbing gives excellent durability.
Embedded wire protects against vandalism.
Delivered with the PlayPro™ trampoline rim protection.
Multiple devices be arranged in groups or combined with other equipment.

title: Jumpstone
description:
The spring attached Jumpstone™ gives a delightful response to the user. When jumping from pad to pad it triggers an exciting and creative play that challenges speed and balance. The modest height makes it safe, even for young children, to make huge leaps and run at high speed.

Jumpstone™ natural rubber jump pads with a rough surface. The Jumpstone is popular for a wide age range.

Jumpstone™ 27
Diameter: 27 cm
Height: 18 cm
Weight: 8 kg

Jumpstone™ 50

title: BalanceBuddy
description:
BalanceBuddy™ is a refined version of the well-known balance beam. It stands out with a shock absorbing rubber padding which makes it safe even for the youngest children to challenge themselves a little extra.

BalanceBuddy™ tempts users of all age groups to balance, run and jump. The balance beam is made of stainless steel padded with a layer of shock absorbing natural rubber with a non-slip texture.

title: Rampit Storm
description:
The Rampit Storm™ climbing pole triggers our instinctive urge to get to the top. Climbing the Rampit Storm™ requires a little technique, courage and strength,  but it is something that everyone can master with a little training.

Rampit Storm™ is an excellent device for play, competition and climbing exercises and suitable for children and youth from school age. Rampit Storm™ is safe to use, and challenges all users to reach the top and hit the bell.

Diameter: 10,3 cm
Height:
– mounted on wet pour ground covers: 400 cm
– mounted on loose fill ground covers: 373 cm
weight: 50 kg

SOMETHING TO STRIVE FOR

Rampit Storm™ is an excellent device for play, competition and climbing exercises and suitable for children and youth from school age. Rampit Storm™ is safe to use, and challenges all users to reach the top and hit the bell.

title: Floating Bench
description:
Floating Bench ™ is not like any other playground equipment. It is a levitating experience for the one who runs along the soft, swirling tracks. It challenges balance and coordination with its bows, turns, waves and straight lines. The visually compelling Floating Bench ™ transforms the landscape and makes an impression on both adults and children.

A DIFFERENT KIND OF GATHERING PLACE

Floating Bench ™ is an individually adapted bench that floats and rolls through the landscape, inspiring the user to creative physical movements. It is also an excellent place for groups of people to gather and socialise. The track is suspended with steel legs in different angles which makes it stylish and robust.

Width: 33 cm
Height: Max. 100 cm

The stated price includes mounting. In addition comes freight, technical drawings for site adaptation as well as ground-level concrete foundation. We are more than happy to provide a cost estimate on Floating Bench ™ for your project. Please contact us.

Floating Bench ™ can be delivered with optional integrated lighting. With dimmable LED light the bench become well visible and visually intriguing day and night, as the lighting emphasizes the levitating characteristics of the bench.

The LED strip spreads the light 180 degrees and is a robust system designed for outdoor use in public environments. The system consists of a continuous LED strip and is dimmable and flexible.

Artificial grass or wet pour ground covers (rubber, cork)
short_description:
A DIFFERENT KIND OF GATHERING PLACE


Floating Bench ™ is an individually adapted bench that floats and rolls through the landscape, inspiring the user to creative physical movements. It is also an excellent place for groups of people to gather and socialise. The track is suspended with steel legs in different angles which makes it stylish and robust.

The track is padded with natural rubber mat with shock absorption and a subtle non-slip texture.
Can be delivered with optional integrated LED light
The bench is mounted on site by Rampline.

title: Rampline slackline
description:
Nothing improves your balance skills like slacklining. It’s the ultimate exercise and gives a great sense of mastery the more you try. The slackline is a device that gets everyone from the youngest to the toughest to keep challenge themselves for hours.

The secret that makes people love slacklining is the dynamic webbing. It’s important not to confuse the slackline with static balance lines made of rope, chains or wires, which do not provide the same challenge and experience for the user.

Installed height: 45 cmLength: 530 cmSlackline length: 410 cmFall height: 100 cm

Simplified drawing showing the required area for a Rampline® slackline.

DoubleTrouble can be set up in several ways. With two parallel lines installed as a group/cluster, as shown in the drawing above, it offers opportunities for more and new tricks and elements to master – such as jumping from one line to the other.

Setups with multiple slack lines can be created in many ways. Shown here is TripleSlackFun, where the slacklines are arranged in a triangular formation with a Rampball70R placed in the center.

Spare parts for Rampline® Slackline can be found here.

Grass/loose-fill ground covers (wood chips, sand etc.)
short_description:
A SLACKLINE RACK certified for PLAYGROUNDS and fitness parks
The Rampline® slackline is the most well designed slackline stand for playgrounds. Featuring a low height and padded platforms that protect the webbing mounts makes it safe for everyone to try slackline, regardless of age and level of functioning.

raw_specs.Multiple Rampline® slackline stands can: 2017 / 3.20. Required minimum distance between the lines is 150 cm.

title: Rampit Hopper
description:
An arrangement of activity bars and turning pads. The device increases your heart rate and challenges mobility, agility, and coordination. It works for both exercise and physical play, or why not have a casual competition with a friend – or with yourself?

The Rampit Hopper™ features 5 bars made of powder-coated steel, with a comfortable and easy-to-grip surface that invites intense activity. Standing at a height of 90 cm, it tempts you to move both over and under the bars. The inclined turning pads are covered with durable natural rubber and withstand powerful thrusts.

Mounted height: 90 cm
Width: 120 cm

Artificial grass or wet pour ground covers (rubber or cork)

Loose fill ground covers (wood chips, sand etc.)

title: Balancebuddy Wave
description:
Balancebuddy Wave™ is a slightly zig-zag shaped balance beam that invites to physical play and movement. It has a low height and shock absorbing balance surface that make it safe and fun to challenge your balance.

Balancebuddy Wave™ is made of hot dip galvanized and powder coated steel. The balance surface is 10 cm wide and covered with a shock absorbing rubber that is kind to bare feet and hands. Balancebuddy Wave™ stimulates balance play and hight intensity activity for all ages.

Artificial grass/wet pour covers (rubber/cork)

The Balancebuddy Wave™ provides training for coordination and balance.

EXCITING - BUT FRIENDLY

Balancebuddy Wave™ is made of hot dip galvanized and powder coated steel. The balance surface is 10 cm wide and covered with a shock absorbing rubber that is kind to bare feet and hands. Balancebuddy Wave™ stimulates balance play and hight intensity activity for all ages.

title: Fungi
description:
Keep your balance, find your own way to climb or just sit down with friends. With its organic shape, Fungi is a friendly element that sparks fun creative play in the playground. It’s as good for climbing, jumping and running, depending on age and skill level.

Fungi™ is a mushroom-shaped element for creative play. Fungi™ works well for small children that will climb the pads, but also for older children that will balance, jump and run. The pads are coated with thick natural rubber and are held up by strong steel pipes.

title: Don’T STEP INTO THE WATER
description:
A group of balance balls arranged so that they function both for fast-paced activity and as a social seating group. Here, users of all ages will find challenges with climbing, running, hopping, and balancing on tilting and rotating Rampballs. Running from ball to ball without touching the ground requires full effort and high focus, and it is exciting to master.

Monteringstid
(monteringstid er antatt tid for entreprenører og inkluderer ikke støping av fundamenter)

Nedlastinger
(3D dwg er for montering i helstøpt dekke)
short_description: A group of balance balls arranged so that they function both for fast-paced activity and as a social seating group. Here, users of all ages will find challenges with climbing, running, hopping, and balancing on tilting and rotating Rampballs. Running from ball to ball without touching the ground requires full effort and high focus, and it is exciting to master.

title: TRIPLE SLACK FUN
description:
Triple Slack Fun is a park that accommodates multiple users to have fun balancing at the same time, with good opportunities for advanced balance training as well. With three slacklines placed in a triangle, the user is challenged to complete as many slackline trips in a row as possible.

With some practice, kids and teenagers will also be able to jump from one of the lines to the Rampball placed in the middle. Triple Slack Fun is also well suited for use in physical education classes.

Area
Approx. 9.2 x 8.5 m / 55.6 m2

Equipment
3 x Rampline® slackline
1 x Rampball® 50
short_description:
Triple Slack Fun is a park that accommodates multiple users to have fun balancing at the same time, with good opportunities for advanced balance training as well. With three slacklines placed in a triangle, the user is challenged to complete as many slackline trips in a row as possible.
With some practice, kids and teenagers will also be able to jump from one of the lines to the Rampball placed in the middle. Triple Slack Fun is also well suited for use in physical education classes.

title: THE FLOOR IS LAVA
description:
Provides countless opportunities to move around in different ways. Depending on skill level, you will challenge yourself to increasingly longer jumps, more demanding balance challenges or increased pace. A popular set-up that provides excitement and lots of play, in a course of jump pads, slacklines, balance bars and balance balls.

Mounting time
Casting of foundations not included
short_description: Provides countless opportunities to move around in different ways. Depending on skill level, you will challenge yourself to increasingly longer jumps, more demanding balance challenges or increased pace. A popular set-up that provides excitement and lots of play, in a course of jump pads, slacklines, balance bars and balance balls.

title: TAKE 5
description: Take 5 facilitates fast-paced play as well as a breather. Fungi climbing mushrooms are irresistible climbing elements for the smallest children, but also inviting and good to sit on. Rampball and Jumpstone are combined with a slackline, which provides the opportunity for intensive balance training, with many exciting challenges to master.
short_description: Take 5 facilitates fast-paced play as well as a breather. Fungi climbing mushrooms are irresistible climbing elements for the smallest children, but also inviting and good to sit on. Rampball and Jumpstone are combined with a slackline, which provides the opportunity for intensive balance training, with many exciting challenges to master.

title: PULSE ZONE
description: An arena for intense balance play, with plenty of exciting exercises to master. Here, play can start with simple and safe activity, which in any case provides high stimulation of balance and motor skills. As the skills develop, the pace can be increased. With high pace and full concentration, you get yourself a really good and playful training session.
short_description: An arena for intense balance play, with plenty of exciting exercises to master. Here, play can start with simple and safe activity, which in any case provides high stimulation of balance and motor skills. As the skills develop, the pace can be increased. With high pace and full concentration, you get yourself a really good and playful training session.

title: PLAY TAG
description:
Playing tag is both exciting and challenging in this park. Your concentration is sharpened, your muscles are tense and your legs are in high gear, so that you can make it as far as possible without being caught!

The Play tag motor skill park is a popular setup that provides endless opportunities for joint play, training and activity, from simple or advanced balance play to activities that challenge speed and endurance.
short_description:
Playing tag is both exciting and challenging in this park. Your concentration is sharpened, your muscles are tense and your legs are in high gear, so that you can make it as far as possible without being caught!
The Play tag motor skill park is a popular setup that provides endless opportunities for joint play, training and activity, from simple or advanced balance play to activities that challenge speed and endurance.

title: NEVER STOP PLAYING
description:
A motor skill park with activities high and low, with countless possibilities. Room for lots of people who can play and exercise at the same time. Exciting challenges and possibilities to do tricks, for example by jumping between the slacklines, or from the trampolines to the balance balls. The toughest can challenge themselves to do all the devices in sequence, which will require a bit of training to master.

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description: A motor skill park with activities high and low, with countless possibilities. Room for lots of people who can play and exercise at the same time. Exciting challenges and possibilities to do tricks, for example by jumping between the slacklines, or from the trampolines to the balance balls. The toughest can challenge themselves to do all the devices in sequence, which will require a bit of training to master.

title: MONKEY BUSINESS
description: In this park have we assembled a range of training and gymnastics racks. The Rampit™ series meets children’s need for variation and challenges in physical play. There are countless ways to use the equipment, providing great variety in movements and putting every muscle to work.
short_description: In this park have we assembled a range of training and gymnastics racks. The Rampit™ series meets children's need for variation and challenges in physical play. There are countless ways to use the equipment, providing great variety in movements and putting every muscle to work.
ground_cover_options: Wet pour, artificial grass or ShockDeck™

title: MARATHON PLAY
description:
A dream of an activity area for young and old, where a Floating Bench connects the entire area. Here you can challenge speed, balance and endurance. Lots of opportunities for jumping, balancing, running, exciting tricks and combinations.

From balance play at a low level, more advanced balance training on a slackline or on rocking and rotating balls, to jumping between trampolines and other equipment. There is also a climbing pole that challenges strength and technique.
short_description:
A dream of an activity area for young and old, where a Floating Bench connects the entire area. Here you can challenge speed, balance and endurance. Lots of opportunities for jumping, balancing, running, exciting tricks and combinations.
From balance play at a low level, more advanced balance training on a slackline or on rocking and rotating balls, to jumping between trampolines and other equipment. There is also a climbing pole that challenges strength and technique.

title: KANGAROO
description:
Kangaroo is an exciting landscape for action, tricks and agile movements. The trampolines provide physical play focused on agility, and the slackline requires concentration and practice. Here you can level up to jumps between trampolines and slacklines, depending on your skill level.

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description: Kangaroo is an exciting landscape for action, tricks and agile movements. The trampolines provide physical play focused on agility, and the slackline requires concentration and practice. Here you can level up to jumps between trampolines and slacklines, depending on your skill level.

title: JUNIOR POWER II
description:
Junior Power II is suitable for a wide age range, starting from preschool age (approx. 2 years) and up. All the equipment has a low height and the distances between devices take into account small legs. The Rampit stands with 85 and 120 cm heights provide very good stimulation for gross motor skills and facilitates varied climbing and tumbling play from an early age.

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description: Junior Power II is suitable for a wide age range, starting from preschool age (approx. 2 years) and up. All the equipment has a low height and the distances between devices take into account small legs. The Rampit stands with 85 and 120 cm heights provide very good stimulation for gross motor skills and facilitates varied climbing and tumbling play from an early age.

title: JUNIOR POWER
description:
A motor skills park adapted for preschool age. The course gives young children the opportunity to play with high stimulation of balance and training of gross motor skills.

Running across the balance beam, across the “stones” and eventually, after some training, jumping onto the balance balls without touching the ground is an exciting play that provides a good sense of accomplishment. The balance balls, which rock and rotate, also serve as good climbing devices for the youngest users. A motor skills park that is also well suited for the development of skills for children with reduced function level.

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description:
A motor skills park adapted for preschool age. The course gives young children the opportunity to play with high stimulation of balance and training of gross motor skills.
Running across the balance beam, across the "stones" and eventually, after some training, jumping onto the balance balls without touching the ground is an exciting play that provides a good sense of accomplishment. The balance balls, which rock and rotate, also serve as good climbing devices for the youngest users. A motor skills park that is also well suited for the development of skills for children with reduced function level.

title: JANE JUMP
description:
A motor skills park where it’s possible to attempt the classic Rampline tricks; running across the rocking and rotating balance balls without touching the ground, jumping from the slackline to the trampoline, jumping from the trampoline to the balance ball. But before you get that far, there are many easier options to play your way to an increasingly better balance.

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description: A motor skills park where it's possible to attempt the classic Rampline tricks; running across the rocking and rotating balance balls without touching the ground, jumping from the slackline to the trampoline, jumping from the trampoline to the balance ball. But before you get that far, there are many easier options to play your way to an increasingly better balance.

title: HUNTING HIGH and LOW
description: This motor skills park offers a variety of activities that stimulate everything from balance, agility and flexibility to endurance and strength. It works at different levels, with  pleasant balance play at low height and more challenging activities for the more advanced.
short_description: This motor skills park offers a variety of activities that stimulate everything from balance, agility and flexibility to endurance and strength. It works at different levels, with  pleasant balance play at low height and more challenging activities for the more advanced.

title: FEARLESS
description: A motor skills park that primarily challenges balance, speed, and movement. Here, you can use your creativity to find your own, fun challenges to master. You start by mastering one device at a time and gradually expand as your skills increase. There is plenty of room for many to be active at the same time.
short_description: A motor skills park that primarily challenges balance, speed, and movement. Here, you can use your creativity to find your own, fun challenges to master. You start by mastering one device at a time and gradually expand as your skills increase. There is plenty of room for many to be active at the same time.

title: FAST and CURIOUS
description: This arrangement has all the qualities of the motor skill park concept. Here, there are ample opportunities for the user to use their own creativity in play, thereby stimulating and developing their movement skills.
short_description: This arrangement has all the qualities of the motor skill park concept. Here, there are ample opportunities for the user to use their own creativity in play, thereby stimulating and developing their movement skills.

title: DEFYING GRAVITY
description: Being able to stay off the ground while balancing between the tilting and rotating balance balls requires training and tenacity. The slackline offers even greater challenges for those who want to master it fully. The more advanced can also try to jump between the trampoline, slackline, and balance balls. The multi-activity rack and pull-up bar complete the park, with opportunities for very varied physical play and training.
short_description: Being able to stay off the ground while balancing between the tilting and rotating balance balls requires training and tenacity. The slackline offers even greater challenges for those who want to master it fully. The more advanced can also try to jump between the trampoline, slackline, and balance balls. The multi-activity rack and pull-up bar complete the park, with opportunities for very varied physical play and training.

title: CROUCHING TIGER
description: Suitable for a long and narrow area. The Crouching Tiger works as a delightful obstacle course, where you can occasionally jump and run at high speed, with the balance balls as challenges that require more concentration and training to fully master.
short_description:
Suitable for a long and narrow area. The Crouching Tiger works as a delightful obstacle course, where you can occasionally jump and run at high speed, with the balance balls as challenges that require more concentration and training to fully master.
&nbsp;

title: CLIFFHANGER
description: The Cliffhanger is designed to trigger varied play high and low, where you use your creativity to find your own challenges and movement patterns on and between the devices. The park is full of opportunities to play your way to good balance and stronger arms and legs.
short_description: The Cliffhanger is designed to trigger varied play high and low, where you use your creativity to find your own challenges and movement patterns on and between the devices. The park is full of opportunities to play your way to good balance and stronger arms and legs.

title: CLASSIC JUMP
description:
Combining a balance beam and tilting and rotating balance balls provides very good stimulation of balance, motor skills, and strength. But most importantly, it is a good starting point for learning the classic Rampline trick; first, balance on the slackline, then jump to the next line, and then jump to a balance ball. It’s not easy, but practice makes perfect!

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description: Combining a balance beam and tilting and rotating balance balls provides very good stimulation of balance, motor skills, and strength. But most importantly, it is a good starting point for learning the classic Rampline trick; first, balance on the slackline, then jump to the next line, and then jump to a balance ball. It's not easy, but practice makes perfect!

title: ALL IN
description:
One of Rampline’s most complete motor skill parks, stimulating the user’s ingenuity. Everyone will find their own movement patterns, providing both challenge and a sense of accomplishment. Many different course options and activities both high and low for balance, strength, agility, and flexibility.

Mounting time
Excl. casting of foundations
short_description: One of Rampline's most complete motor skill parks, stimulating the user's ingenuity. Everyone will find their own movement patterns, providing both challenge and a sense of accomplishment. Many different course options and activities both high and low for balance, strength, agility, and flexibility.

title: Rampbow
description:
To truly master the Rampbow™, the user must combine balance and agility, strength and speed. This is a safe but challenging piece of equipment, which also looks nice and inviting in the activity area.

The long slanted arch challenges users at all levels to climbing and jumping movements as well as creative balancing activities. The height of 106 cm makes the Rampbow both exciting and challenging.

Length: 532 cm
Height: 106 cm (Placed on grass the maximum allowed height is 100 cm. This is obtained by heighten the ground level slightly under the center of the arch.)
Weight:
– Rampbow for wet pour ground covers or artificial grass
– Rampbow for grass or loose fill ground covers

Artificial grass or wet pour ground covers (rubber/cork etc.)

*When placed on grass the maximum allowed height is 100 cm. This is obtained by heighten the ground level slightly under the center of the arch.

The links will open Google Drive folders where you can choose to download the desired product variant.– Technical files include safety areas– 3D DWG also includes foundations below ground level– BIM files additionally include relevant information and links to downloadable documentsIf you are missing anything, please contact us at contact@rampline.no

Rampbow™ provides training for coordination and balance skills.

Muscle groups: Thigh, leg and core muscles
short_description:
physical Activity with a great span
The long slanted arch challenges users at all levels to climbing and jumping movements as well as creative balancing activities. The height of 106 cm makes the Rampbow both exciting and challenging.

Manufactured from heavy-duty stainless steel
Powder-coated finish that's kind to bare skin

title: ROCK
description:
A playspot with a climbing mushrom and three Rampballs in different sizes. The combination offers very good stimulation for balance and motor skills, and is suitable for a wide age range. Small children will often climb the mushroom and balance on the balls lying on their stomachs, while older users will have plenty of challenges mastering how to move between the devices.

Equipment
1 x Rampball 50
2 x Rampball 70R
1 x Fungi 5

title: IMPACT
description:
The combination of slackline and trampoline creates activity that stimulates motor skills, balance, and especially agility. Younger children will use the trampoline and slackline separately, while older children and adolescents can try to jump from the dynamic slackline to the trampoline and vice versa.

Equipment
1 x Rampline® Slackline
1 x Kids Tramp Playground Loop™

description:
The combination of slackline, trampoline and Rampball creates activity that stimulates motor skills, balance, and especially agility. Younger children will use the trampoline, slackline, and balance ball separately, while older children and adolescents can try to jump from the dynamic line to the trampoline or Rampball and vice versa, where the different challenges require different skills from the user.

title: FLEX FOREST
description: An arena for intense balance play, with plenty of exciting movement sequences and exercises to master. Here, play can start with simple, safe, and careful activity, which nonetheless provides high stimulation of balance and motor skills. As skills develop, the pace can be increased. With high pace and full concentration, you get a really good and fun workout.

An arena for intense balance play, with plenty of exciting movement sequences and exercises to master. Here, play can start with simple, safe, and careful activity, which nonetheless provides high stimulation of balance and motor skills. As skills develop, the pace can be increased. With high pace and full concentration, you get a really good and fun workout.
&nbsp;

title: DOUBLE TROUBLE
description:
Two parallel slacklines offer possibilities for performing tricks and jumping between the lines. Several individuals can participate simultaneously, allowing for competitions to determine who falls off first or crosses the fastest. Additionally, two people can engage in synchronized trick practice.

Equipment
2 x Rampline® Slackline

title: Spare parts Rampline
description:
We supply all necessary parts for the Rampline® slackline system. Please contact us at kontakt@rampline.no if you have any questions or need parts other than those listed in the menu below.

On this page you can also download installation instructions for the different lines (PDF). For all spare parts, installation instructions are included.

This is the standard line supplied with the Rampline slackline system (from 2026).

SlackShield™ is made of nylon and features a UV-resistant rubber coating on the top side. It is robust and durable, providing a comfortable and consistent slacklining experience.Requires very little maintenance and re-tensioning. Typical service life is approx. 3–5 years.Width: 40 mmColour: Sand and black

SlackShield™ with integrated wire rope is the most robust line option for the Rampline slackline system. It is made of nylon with a UV-resistant rubber coating on the top side. In addition, it is vandal-resistant due to the wire rope sewn into the line. This is the most durable line variant and provides a good user experience, although it is slightly stiffer because of the wire rope.

Requires very little maintenance and re-tensioning. Typical service life is approx. 3–5 years.We recommend SlackShield™ with wire rope for locations exposed to vandalism.

Width: 40 mmColour: Sand, black and light grey

The polyester line is a more cost-effective option. It is PVC-coated and is the most dynamic line type, offering the ultimate slackline experience. Typical service life is approx. 2–3 years. The line should be re-tensioned regularly in areas with intensive use.Width: 35 mmColour: Lime green
short_description: Spare parts for Rampline® Slackline. Please choose a part below.

title: spare parts KIDS TRAMP TRAMPOLINES
description:
We supply all necessary parts for the robust Eurotramp trampolines. Experience shows that this is a popular piece of equipment, used intensively by children and young people across all age groups. With frequent and regular use, normal wear should be expected, and maintenance requirements may increase.

Please contact us at kontakt@rampline.no if you have any questions or need parts other than those listed in the menu below.

Installation instructions are included with all spare parts.

Spare parts for Kids Tramp trampolines.Please choose a part below.

title: ShockDeck
description:
ShockDeck™ is a system for building an impact-absorbing ground cover using wooden decking. The solution is perfect for universally designed playgrounds and activity areas, and does not result in microplastic emissions. The ground cover is certified for fall heights up to 180 cm.

ShockDeck™ provides effective shock absorption for safe play on standard terrace boards. It replaces fall protection such as poured rubber or artificial grass and is suitable as a surface for all types of activity and play equipment.

Only specific types of pine decking boards (see table below) may be used to build ShockDeck™. These are available in several variants and supplied by multiple manufacturers.

For battens, pressure (Cu) treated pine 28×45 mm is always used. Along fixed edges, 28×45 mm battens are also used.

Please note that the European standard for battens differs from the Norwegian standard. The ShockDeck™ system is designed to be compatible with both the Norwegian standard (30×48 mm) and the European standard (28×45 mm).

Approved Decking Board Types for ShockDeck™

The materials used are approved for outdoor use and comply with applicable requirements for health, environment and safety.

The materials used in building ShockDeck™ have been carefully selected with regard to durability, function and environmental impact. The solution can be built using various types of standard decking boards, such as pressure-treated (Cu-treated) pine, thermo-pine or Royal-treated pine.
short_description:
Environmentally friendly and universally designed ground cover

ShockDeck™ provides effective shock absorption for safe play on standard terrace boards. It replaces fall protection such as poured rubber or artificial grass and is suitable as a surface for all types of activity and play equipment.

Fall height up to 180 cm (EN 1177:2018).
Supplied as shock absorbers with adjustable feet. The wooden decking itself is easily built from pressure treated wood in standard dimensions.
Calculate approximately 4 shock absorbers per square meter. Choose the number of shock absorbers below.
